calendar.matters:
Notice Of Morion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel.
Off Calendar Jun-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen Fraser for Daniel Beagle.

Mr. Fraser stated that nothing had changed, that he had no contact the Beagle's and that he not been paid. In addition, he stated that Ms. Epstein had been noticed. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Peppina Thompson CSR#7433. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Apr-02-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
STEPHEN A. FRASER, ESQ., (415)332-2421, MOVING PARTY
NO OTHER APPEARANCES WERE MADE

THE MATTER WAS BRIEFLY ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: STEPHEN A. FRASER'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR RESPONDENTS DANIEL BEAGLE, LISA BEAGLE IS OFF CALENDAR. REQUEST SHOULD BE BROUGHT IN PROBATE DEPARTMENT(LOCAL RULE 14.11) 8.1(B)(8) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB)

Petn. To Recover Trust Assets And For Double Damanges
Off Calendar Feb-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bette Epstein for Connor Cochran (Trustee). William Pedder for Peter Beagle. Steven Frasier for Danial Beagle and Lisa Reubens (Respondents).

Ms. Epstein stated that the notice issue had been addressed, and that they reached a agreement with additional terms that were read for the record. Mr. Frasier's request to have Lisa Reubens name removed from the order was denied. Mr. Frasier agreed to the attorneys fees being paid by Danial Beagle, but objected to Lisa Reubens being charged for attorneys fees. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

Petn. To Recover Trust Assets And For Double Damanges
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Continued To Feb-13-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
